decision.response_reason: the native receiving-substrate gain is the bounded downstream continuation consequence common to all three accepted V paths; feedback score and scheduling status remain intermediate audit fields
decision.primary_candidate: two-source combined common-carrier constitution in both frozen source-role orders
decision.comparator_reason: it preserves total contribution and the inherited one-source carrier relation while removing multi-source joint constitution, making it the closest insufficient-repetition explanation rather than the contrast expected to maximize effect size
decision.order_rule: both orders and all per-seed margins are retained; no canonical-order selection or scalar collapse

analysis_identity.responsibility: validate raw response records, preserve operational missingness, pair exact strata, compute normalized margins, classify relation vocabulary, and evaluate numeric machine rules

calibration_identity.null_population: ten equal exact-rational response pairs spanning five seeds and two order strata
calibration_identity.estimator: max(measurement_resolution, maximum absolute matched-null normalized margin)
calibration_identity.candidate_runtime_exclusion: entrypoint accepts only the analysis policy, calibration policy, I04 preregistration, a later owner-authorized I05 execution freeze, and output path; it imports no PyGRC and receives no candidate artifact, outcome, seed, runtime, graph, or I03 fixture input
calibration_identity.mechanical_I05_gate: the entrypoint refuses execution without a future I05 freeze that records owner CAL-PRE acceptance, authorizes exactly one null invocation, keeps candidate execution false, and binds the supplied I04 identities

mode_registry.primary_pairing: two-source versus matched repeated-single-source in both orders

mode_registry.causal_carrier: authoritative H_P through native M_H; P excluded from V

mode_registry.primary_pairing: two-source versus matched repeated-single-source in both orders

aggregation_and_decision_boundary.operational_missingness: null response; full two-order mode-seed panel not evaluable; no imputation or denominator removal
